category_sources: source_facts.description says utilities for manipulating PostScript documents; official README says PSUtils manipulates PDF and PostScript documents.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is psutils; official README title is PDF and PostScript Utilities and uses PSUtils.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is primary documentation; official repository includes psutils.1 and individual utility manpage sources.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is https://github.com/rrthomas/psutils; official README states the web site is that GitHub repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables list PostScript utilities; official README describes page selection, rearrangement, n-up printing, resizing, flipping, and rotating.
